title: synister_banc: Synapse-level neurotransmitter prediction for the BANC connectome
description: Trained synister (Eckstein, Bates et al., 2024) neurotransmitter classifier applied to synapses in the Brain And Nerve Cord (BANC) connectome (Bates, Phelps, Kim, Yang et al., 2025). Provides per-synapse predictions over eight fast-acting transmitters (GABA, acetylcholine, glutamate, serotonin, octopamine, dopamine, histamine, tyramine) for synapses with predicted size > 5, together with the BANC ground-truth train/test split used for model training and evaluation. Predictions are released as a parquet table on Google Cloud Storage and as a CAVE annotation table.

contributors.name: Lee, Wei-Chung Allen
